mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO skeleton_pipeline_step ( task_id, step_no, step_name, step_key, status, progress, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
(#{step.taskId}, #{step.stepNo}, #{step.stepName}, #{step.stepKey}, #{step.status}, #{step.progress}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE skeleton_pipeline_step SET status = 'SUCCESS', progress = 100, output_image_url = #{outputImageUrl}, output_data_json = #{outputDataJson}, output_file_url = #{outputFileUrl}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, duration_ms = #{durationMs}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND step_no = #{stepNo}
UPDATE skeleton_pipeline_step SET status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, completed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND step_no = #{stepNo}
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, step_no, step_name, step_key, status, progress, error_message, output_image_url, started_at, completed_at, duration_ms, input_tokens, output_tokens, model_name, created_at, updated_at FROM skeleton_pipeline_step WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY step_no ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE skeleton_pipeline_step SET input_tokens = #{inputTokens}, output_tokens = #{outputTokens}, model_name = #{modelName}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND step_no = #{stepNo}
